nodes.name: Fetch Active Users with Prefs & CV

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, temperature: 0.1, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are an expert ATS analyst. Analyze this job against the candidate CV.

Return ONLY raw JSON (no markdown, no code blocks):
{"compatibility_score":<0-100>,"ats_keywords":[<up to 10>],"matching_strengths":[<up to 5>],"gaps":[<up to 5>],"recommendation":"apply"|"stretch"|"skip"}

Scoring: skills 40%, experience 25%, education 15%, industry 20%. apply=80+, stretch=60-79, skip=<60.

JOB TITLE: ' + $json.title + '
COMPANY: ' + $json.company + '
JOB DESCRIPTION:
' + $json.description.substring(0, 3000) + '

CANDIDATE CV:
' + $json.masterCvText.substring(0, 5000) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are an expert ATS resume writer. Rewrite this CV for the job below.

Return ONLY raw JSON (no markdown fences):
{"tailored_cv_markdown":"<CV in markdown>","motivation_letter_markdown":"<cover letter in markdown>"}

RULES: NEVER fabricate. ONLY use info from CV. MAY reorder/rephrase with ATS keywords. Clean Markdown, single-column, max 2 pages. Cover letter: 250-350 words, reference company+role, no cliches.

LANGUAGE RULE: Detect the language of the job description. Generate the ENTIRE CV and cover letter in that SAME language. French job = French output. German job = German output. English job = English output. Section headers, summary, experience descriptions, and cover letter must ALL be in the detected language.

ATS KEYWORDS: ' + JSON.stringify($json.atsKeywords) + '

JOB: ' + $json.title + ' at ' + $json.company + '
' + $json.description.substring(0, 3000) + '

CV:
' + $json.masterCvText.substring(0, 5000) }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'fetch_jobs_for_user', runId: String($execution.id || Date.now()), data: { user: { userId: $json.userId, targetTitles: $json.targetTitles, locations: $json.locations, remotePreference: $json.remotePreference, masterCvText: $json.masterCvText, subscriptionStatus: $json.subscriptionStatus, creditsRemaining: $json.creditsRemaining }, sourceConfig: { adzunaAppId: $('Load Config').first().json.adzunaAppId || '', adzunaAppKey: $('Load Config').first().json.adzunaAppKey || '', jsearchApiKey: $('Load Config').first().json.jsearchApiKey || '', joobleApiKey: $('Load Config').first().json.joobleApiKey || '', reedApiKey: $('Load Config').first().json.reedApiKey || '' } } }) }}

main.node: Fetch Active Users with Prefs & CV

parameters.query: SELECT u."id", u."email", u."name", u."subscriptionStatus", u."creditsRemaining", jp."targetTitles", jp."locations", jp."remotePreference", jp."salaryMin", jp."industries", mp."rawText" AS "masterCvText" FROM "users" u LEFT JOIN "job_preferences" jp ON jp."userId" = u."id" LEFT JOIN "master_profiles" mp ON mp."userId" = u."id" WHERE u."automationEnabled" = true AND u."subscriptionStatus" IN ('pro', 'unlimited') AND mp."rawText" IS NOT NULL AND jp."id" IS NOT NULL
